series_metadata.series_description: Includes those records pertaining to ancillary or non-substantial matters, activities and tasks that are handled solely in accordance with existing policies but which, due to their varied or irregular nature, do not accurately correlate with the description set forth in any other series.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for period specified for electronic format, then destroy. If converted to electronic/digital format, paper records may be destroyed after verification of successful conversion. ; Electronic: Retain one (1) year after close of matter, activity, or task, or until superseded or obsolete, then destroy. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
